title: Theme Memory
description: Tracks themes extracted from accepted/rejected records with associated positive and negative terms

theme_id.description: Auto-generated slug identifier for the theme

positive_terms.description: Terms that are indicative of this theme in accepted records

negative_terms.description: Terms that should be excluded or indicate noise for this theme

accepted_count.description: Number of accepted records associated with this theme

review_count.description: Number of records sent to review for this theme

rejected_count.description: Number of rejected records associated with this theme

last_seen.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this theme was last seen

priority_score.description: Computed priority score based on accepted/rejected/review counts
